data.description: US and Iran and a group of regional mediators are discussing the terms for a potential 45-day ceasefire that could lead to a permanent end to the war, according to four US, Israeli and regional sources with knowledge of the talks.

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. Partners with Ace Ventures to Establish New York’s First Minority-owned Vertically Integrated Medical Cannabis Operator
data.description: Ace Ventures, a MWBE-led company, is set to acquire majority ownership of Vireo Health of New York. This strategic partnership underscores a commitment to New York's social equity framework. This move signifies a significant shift in ownership and direction for Vireo Health of New York, with a focus on aligning with the state's social equity values. This acquisition marks a new chapter for both companies and demonstrates a proactive approach to supporting diversity in business ownership. This change is a step towards fostering a more inclusive and representative cannabis industry landscape in New York.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Sees Iran Deal Or 'Hell'; Sandisk Leads 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: In a recent statement, President Trump issued a warning of significant retaliatory measures, hinting at potential massive attacks towards Iran if the closure of the Strait of Hormuz persists. Amidst this escalating tension, a push for a market rebound is evident. Investors are advised to remain alert for a crucial indicator. Meanwhile, Sandisk stands out as one of the seven key stocks to monitor closely in light of these developments and the broader market conditions.
